Title: Senate BILL NO. 608
Official Title: 
Number of Sections: 1
Source: versions - As Passed by the Senate
Media Type: text/html

================================================================================

Section 1:
Senate BILL NO. 608 substitute for Senate BILL NO. 608 A bill to amend 2020 PA 220, entitled "Industrial hemp growers act," by repealing sections 101, 103, 105, 201, 211, 213, 215, 217, 301, 303, 305, 307, 309, 311, 313, 401, 403, 405, 407, 409, 501, 503, 505, 507, 509, 511, 513, 515, 601, 602, 603, 605, 607, 609, and 801 (MCL 333.29101, 333.29103, 333.29105, 333.29201, 333.29211, 333.29213, 333.29215, 333.29217, 333.29301, 333.29303, 333.29305, 333.29307, 333.29309, 333.29311, 333.29313, 333.29401, 333.29403, 333.29405, 333.29407, 333.29409, 333.29501, 333.29503, 333.29505, 333.29507, 333.29509, 333.29511, 333.29513, 333.29515, 333.29601, 333.29602, 333.29603, 333.29605, 333.29607, 333.29609, and 333.29801). the peoplE of the state of michigan enact: Enacting section 1. Sections 101, 103, 105, 201, 211, 213, 215, 217, 301, 303, 305, 307, 309, 311, 313, 401, 403, 405, 407, 409, 501, 503, 505, 507, 509, 511, 513, 515, 601, 602, 603, 605, 607, 609, and 801 of the industrial hemp growers act, 2020 PA 220, MCL 333.29101, 333.29103, 333.29105, 333.29201, 333.29211, 333.29213, 333.29215, 333.29217, 333.29301, 333.29303, 333.29305, 333.29307, 333.29309, 333.29311, 333.29313, 333.29401, 333.29403, 333.29405, 333.29407, 333.29409, 333.29501, 333.29503, 333.29505, 333.29507, 333.29509, 333.29511, 333.29513, 333.29515, 333.29601, 333.29602, 333.29603, 333.29605, 333.29607, 333.29609, and 333.29801, are repealed. Enacting section 2. This amendatory act takes effect February 1, 2027.


================================================================================

Raw Text:
Senate BILL NO. 608 substitute for Senate BILL NO. 608 A bill to amend 2020 PA 220, entitled "Industrial hemp growers act," by repealing sections 101, 103, 105, 201, 211, 213, 215, 217, 301, 303, 305, 307, 309, 311, 313, 401, 403, 405, 407, 409, 501, 503, 505, 507, 509, 511, 513, 515, 601, 602, 603, 605, 607, 609, and 801 (MCL 333.29101, 333.29103, 333.29105, 333.29201, 333.29211, 333.29213, 333.29215, 333.29217, 333.29301, 333.29303, 333.29305, 333.29307, 333.29309, 333.29311, 333.29313, 333.29401, 333.29403, 333.29405, 333.29407, 333.29409, 333.29501, 333.29503, 333.29505, 333.29507, 333.29509, 333.29511, 333.29513, 333.29515, 333.29601, 333.29602, 333.29603, 333.29605, 333.29607, 333.29609, and 333.29801). the peoplE of the state of michigan enact: Enacting section 1. Sections 101, 103, 105, 201, 211, 213, 215, 217, 301, 303, 305, 307, 309, 311, 313, 401, 403, 405, 407, 409, 501, 503, 505, 507, 509, 511, 513, 515, 601, 602, 603, 605, 607, 609, and 801 of the industrial hemp growers act, 2020 PA 220, MCL 333.29101, 333.29103, 333.29105, 333.29201, 333.29211, 333.29213, 333.29215, 333.29217, 333.29301, 333.29303, 333.29305, 333.29307, 333.29309, 333.29311, 333.29313, 333.29401, 333.29403, 333.29405, 333.29407, 333.29409, 333.29501, 333.29503, 333.29505, 333.29507, 333.29509, 333.29511, 333.29513, 333.29515, 333.29601, 333.29602, 333.29603, 333.29605, 333.29607, 333.29609, and 333.29801, are repealed. Enacting section 2. This amendatory act takes effect February 1, 2027.
